name: postal-missing-street-only
anchor: Layer 3 (postal missing — when is it required?)
rationale: Subject property address provided in all sources as '287 Glencairn Avenue, Toronto, ON' WITHOUT postal code suffix. F1.PC canonical-map has no postal source. Layer 3: is postal_code a REQUIRED canonical field (escalate-as-missing) or DERIVED-via-lookup (Vienna geocodes from street address)? Product-design decision.
notes: Single-event sequence. Layer 3 item — postal field requirement semantic.
